prompt: Pixar-quality 3D animation, soft ambient lighting, Disney character design. Same young Chinese man in gray hoodie stands up from his office chair and stretches his arms high with relief. He picks up his phone from the desk and sees a message. His round face lights up with a big grin, he pumps his fist in celebration. He grabs his backpack from under the desk and starts packing up to leave, still smiling. Same dimly lit office at night. Natural speed, no slow motion, no text on screens, no facing camera. Chinese Mandarin dialogue: '老板说明天放假！' Dialogue finishes before second 14.

Japanese 3D anime, Makoto Shinkai lighting, CG-anime hybrid, golden hour atmosphere. Same Chinese high school boy on the same rooftop. He opens his eyes, reaches into his pocket and takes out earphones, puts them in his ears. He picks up his canvas bag from the ground, slings it over his shoulder, turns and walks toward the stairwell door.
